edits.note: WP-12 pt7: kill the dual-system raw info-blue literal (the 'barely-visible blue border'). Route the click-to-edit hover underline onto the WCAG-bumped --gam-tok-info so the affordance reads at AA. <style>-rule -> var() is safe.

WP-12 pt8 + PART2: collapse the dual --bb-amber legacy var onto the single brand token --gam-tok-accent so the auto-DR-sweep primary CTA draws from one system. rgba(255,153,51,*) tints left as-is (varied-alpha derived fill, not a hex; matches accent at 15/25%).

WP-12 pt2 + PART1.7 on-accent split: active-filter fill is amber (C.ACCENT), so text must be on-accent-DARK (#0a0a0b, black-on-amber 9.86) not raw #fff (amber white-text fails 4.5:1). Mirrors the audited .gam-snack-info precedent. Kills a raw #fff literal.

PART1.7 on-accent split: the checkmark sits on the amber .gam-t-check-on fill (C.ACCENT), so on-accent-DARK is the WCAG-correct ink. Kills a raw #fff literal. Glyph content (accessible mark) unchanged.
PART1.7 on-accent split: flush button fill is danger (C.RED), so white text is correct and must route to on-accent-LIGHT. Mirrors audited .gam-btn-danger / .gam-snack-error. Kills a raw #fff literal.

#gam-users-live-dot live indicator. This is el.style.cssText (INJECTED inline) -> var() is forbidden, MUST use GAM_TOK.success string-concat (PART2.1). Routes the raw #3dd68c success literal to the token.

live-dot 'fetching' state: collapse the legacy --bb-amber-warm var onto --gam-tok-warn (caution/in-flight). This is an innerHTML style ATTRIBUTE on a real parsed DOM element (not el.style.cssText), so var() resolves correctly. Accessible text '● fetching…' unchanged.
live-dot 'live' state: raw #3dd68c -> success token. innerHTML style attribute on real DOM -> var() resolves. Kills a raw hex literal. Accessible text '● live (60s)' unchanged.

live-dot 'paused' state: raw #5c6370 folds to ink-faint per DESIGN-TOKENS top-literal map (#5c6370 -> ink-faint). innerHTML style attribute on real DOM -> var() resolves. Kills a raw hex literal. Accessible text '● paused (tab hidden)' unchanged.

summary: WP-12 triage-console: 9 surgical color-only edits drive the component's RAW hex/legacy-var literals to zero. Three #fff -> the PART1.7 on-accent split (dark on amber filter/check fills, light on the red flush button), matching audited .gam-snack/.gam-btn precedents. Two legacy --bb-* vars (--bb-amber sweep CTA, --bb-amber-warm live-dot) collapse onto --gam-tok-accent / --gam-tok-warn, killing the dual style system. The 'barely-visible blue' click-to-edit underline routes to WCAG-bumped --gam-tok-info. Three raw inline hex on #gam-users-live-dot route to success/ink-faint: the el.style.cssText one uses GAM_TOK.success concat (var() forbidden in injected cssText, PART2.1); the two innerHTML style-attribute ones use var(--gam-tok-*) since they parse to real DOM. Every oldString verified to occur EXACTLY once. No locked selector renamed; no accessible-name textContent changed. rgba signal-tints with non-token alphas (.05-.4) deliberately left untouched (varied-alpha derived fills, not hex literals; collapsing them would change visuals beyond color-only and is WP-01 soft/line-token territory).
